general_goal_of_analysis: Explain the operation of Brazil's golden rule (fiscal rule) and evaluate its performance based on its characteristics and international experience
brief_justification: This is a descriptive institutional analysis of Brazil's fiscal golden rule. The paper explains how the rule operates and evaluates it against international experience (UK, Germany). It contains no tables, figures, or equations, no statistical analysis, no regression models, and only 14 references across 12 pages. It is an essayistic policy evaluation piece, not a quantitative empirical study.
